german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: Half of roles do not require German, highlighting significant accessibility for non-German speakers.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical PMs Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight gap indicates a competitive landscape for product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: More than half of the workforce is comprised of senior-level positions, indicating a strong senior-heavy environment.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of work is performed on-site, highlighting limited flexibility in remote arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce
ai.subtitle: Only 22% of roles prioritize AI as a core responsibility, indicating limited mainstream adoption.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
